vehicles.engine: L83 - Spark Ignited Direct Injection, Variable Valve Timing, AFM, E85 MAX, ALUM
vehicles.description: This 2020 Chevrolet Tahoe LT offers excellent value in a spacious, three-row SUV perfect for families and those needing versatile cargo space. Equipped with a robust L83 engine featuring direct injection and variable valve timing, this vehicle delivers reliable performance and capability. With 175,000 miles, it represents a solid pre-owned option for buyers seeking a well-established full-size SUV at an attractive price point.

This sleek 2016 CHEVROLET Corvette Preferred 2LT with Z51 package features a powerful 6.2L V8 engine and has been meticulously maintained with 97,000 miles. A true performance machine with luxury amenities, this Corvette is ready to impress on the road.

This 2016 Ford F-250 Super Duty boasts a powerful engine and spacious interior, making it the perfect workhorse for any job. With a single rear wheel configuration and 175,000 miles on the odometer, this dependable truck is ready to tackle any task with ease.

This 2019 FORD F-150 XLT is a well-maintained pre-owned vehicle featuring 4x2, 5.0L 4V, Automatic transmission. With 59,655 miles on the odometer, this vehicle has plenty of life left. Equipped with Back-Up Camera, Bluetooth Connection, Navigation, Keyless Entry, Cruise Control. Stop by Bells Fork Truck & Auto in Greenville, NC or call (252) 496-0005 for more information.

This 2019 RAM 1500 SLT boasts a powerful 5.7L engine and has been meticulously maintained, with 135,000 highway miles. With its rugged yet refined design, this truck is ready to tackle any job you throw its way.

This 2004 CHEVROLET Silverado offers reliable 4WD performance and a fuel-efficient 2.2L V4 engine, making it an ideal choice for both work and everyday driving. With only 173,000 miles, this Silverado is ready to tackle any road ahead with power and efficiency.

This 2011 CHEVROLET Silverado LT offers a powerful 4.8L V8 engine with 138,000 miles, perfect for your towing needs. With its sleek chrome wheels, tow hitch, and Extended Cab, this truck is ready to tackle any task ahead.

Experience the perfect blend of luxury and performance with this 2018 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LTZ. With its striking Deep Ocean Blue Metallic exterior and elegant tan interior, this truck not only stands out but also offers a spacious and comfortable ride. Powered by a reliable V-shaped engine and boasting 95,000 miles, it’s designed for both work and play. Don't miss your chance to own a versatile vehicle that combines rugged capability with refined features.

Equipped with Back-Up Camera, Bluetooth Connection, Navigation, Heated Front Seats, Keyless Start. Stop by Bells Fork Truck & Auto in Greenville, NC or call (252) 496-0005 for more information.

Presenting a dependable 2017 Ford F-150 SuperCab, equipped with a powerful 5.0L engine and boasting 100,000 miles of reliable performance. This versatile truck combines rugged capability with comfort, making it ideal for both work and leisure. With its generous cargo space and fuel-efficient gasoline engine, the F-150 is ready to tackle any challenge. Don't miss the opportunity to own a vehicle that balances strength and practicality seamlessly.
